title: Union Preparatory celebrates excellence
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union Preparatory School hosted its annual prize-giving ceremony on 22 October.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union Preparatory School hosted its annual prize-giving ceremony on 22 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Delivering the keynote address, student governing body chairperson Justin Kingwill reflected on the school’s shared values of pride, gratitude and unity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He praised the collective efforts of learners, parents and teachers in upholding Union’s reputation for excellence across academics, sport and culture.","html":"He praised the collective efforts of learners, parents and teachers in upholding Union’s reputation for excellence across academics, sport and culture."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Union Preparatory is more than just a school - it’s a family woven into the fabric of Graaff-Reinet,” Kingwill said.","html":"“Union Preparatory is more than just a school - it’s a family woven into the fabric of Graaff-Reinet,” Kingwill said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Funds and upgrades","html":"Funds and upgrades"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He highlighted the school’s 2025 fundraising achievements, which made possible the complete renewal of the school’s roof - a major milestone made possible through teamwork and community generosity.","html":"He highlighted the school’s 2025 fundraising achievements, which made possible the complete renewal of the school’s roof - a major milestone made possible through teamwork and community generosity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kingwill expressed special thanks to Montego Pet Nutrition for their continued partnership and investment in the school’s development.","html":"Kingwill expressed special thanks to Montego Pet Nutrition for their continued partnership and investment in the school’s development."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sporting accomplishments also featured prominently in his speech, with Kingwill commending the renewed focus on athletic excellence and the commitment of coaches and learners alike.","html":"Sporting accomplishments also featured prominently in his speech, with Kingwill commending the renewed focus on athletic excellence and the commitment of coaches and learners alike."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Values","html":"Values"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Central to his message was the call to uphold strong values.","html":"Central to his message was the call to uphold strong values."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Excellence is not just about marks or trophies, but about kindness, honesty, and how we rise after failure,” he reminded learners.","html":"“Excellence is not just about marks or trophies, but about kindness, honesty, and how we rise after failure,” he reminded learners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kingwill also paid tribute to principal Ross Hulleman, the dedicated teaching and support staff, and retiring members Linda Greyling and Donald Kingwill for their years of devoted service.","html":"Kingwill also paid tribute to principal Ross Hulleman, the dedicated teaching and support staff, and retiring members Linda Greyling and Donald Kingwill for their years of devoted service."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He closed by reminding learners that true success lies in perseverance and character: “Better human beings build better communities.”","html":"He closed by reminding learners that true success lies in perseverance and character: “Better human beings build better communities.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
